description: Configure GPredict for high-speed numerical orbital mechanics analysis using the credentials username 'ga' and password 'password123'. The configuration requires a ground station for Tromso Space Physics Center (69.6492°N, 18.9553°E, 20m altitude) set as the default QTH. A tracking module named 'Physics_Telemetry' must be created for satellites SUOMI NPP (37849), NOAA 19 (33591), and METOP-B (38771), using a 'List' layout that displays only the Satellite, Range, Range Rate, Altitude, and Velocity columns. Additionally, the global module update cycle must be set to 100 milliseconds. GPredict is already open.
